steps.summary: Added kifrs/feedback/queue.py and tests/test_feedback_queue.py. FeedbackQueueRecord stores validated case/correction candidates as public-safe JSONL records, preserving case_id, domain, route, disposition, severity, issue, expected_improvement, missing_evidence, affected_outputs, and source. write_queue/load_queue detect duplicate record_id and do not store raw source payload.

Implemented summarize_queue, split_queue, and render_queue_report. Reports split eval_seed_candidate/backlog_candidate/no_action, count records by domain, and surface high/blocker severity records while preserving public-safe boundaries. Verification: python -m pytest tests/test_feedback_queue.py -q -> 7 passed, with existing .pytest_cache warning.

Added scripts/feedback_queue_report.py and generated docs/feedback/feedback_queue.sample.jsonl plus docs/reports/2026-07-05-fi3-feedback-queue-report.md. The sample queue has 2 public-safe records: 1 eval seed candidate and 1 backlog candidate, spanning KIFRS1116 and KIFRS1109, with 1 high severity record surfaced in the report.

Closed the horizon with docs/reports/2026-07-05-fi4-feedback-eval-backlog-close-report.md. Close gate passed: tests/test_feedback_queue.py + tests/test_real_case_feedback.py -> 16 passed; quality_preflight ok/public_safe True; git diff --check only LF->CRLF warnings. Recommended next horizon is toolkit-packaging-readiness.
